name: SecureSkillHub
description: Security-first directory of AI agent skills and MCP servers with multi-agent verification.
instructions: Start by reading site/entry.md for the progressive disclosure flow. PREFERRED: Use the dynamic API at api.secureskillhub.workers.dev/v2/ for search, filtering, and targeted queries (small responses, 2-5KB). FALLBACK: Use static files for bulk data or offline use. For quick results, use packages/ first (~5KB each). Do NOT parse index.html — it is a human-facing frontend.
